notes: v249 — Fresh prices flow again, Download all fixed, lessons brought up to date. The 'live list came back incomplete' notice was appearing on every load because the app compared today's live market (~2,900 shares actually listed) against your saved store (~4,300 — which keeps every share ever downloaded, including delisted ones). It now compares against the last accepted live count, so good live lists are accepted again while genuinely cut-short ones are still rejected. Also fixed: the ⬇ Download all button crashed at its confirmation step (a leftover from an old rework), and the background fresh-prices fetch could silently skip on some devices at startup. And all 17 training lessons are refreshed — the loading walkthrough now describes the automatic open-and-it's-there behaviour, plus a brand-new lesson 17 explaining the Signals column, every flag, and the confirmed ✓ Director/News tags.
